data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the preferred channel override at the subscription level.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'preferred channel override at subscription level', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence related to this specific requirement or its functionality. The evidence primarily covers other aspects of the saga lifecycle without addressing the specific requirement for the preferred channel override, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: Preferred channel override at subscription level is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
